org.jlab.epsci.ersap.util

Class EnvUtils

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.util.EnvUtils

  • public final class EnvUtils
extends java.lang.Object

      Gets the value of the ERSAP_HOME environment variable.

    • Method Detail

      • ersapHome

        public static java.lang.String ersapHome()
        Gets the value of the ERSAP_HOME environment variable.
        Returns:
        the ERSAP home directory

      • ersapUserData

        public static java.lang.String ersapUserData()
        Gets the value of the ERSAP_USER_DATA environment variable.
        Returns:
        the ERSAP_USER_DATA home directory

      • userName

        public static java.lang.String userName()
        Gets the user account name.
        Returns:
        the account name of the user running ERSAP.

      • userHome

        public static java.lang.String userHome()
        Gets the user home directory.
        Returns:
        the home directory of the user running ERSAP.

      • expandEnvironment

        public static java.lang.String expandEnvironment(java.lang.String input,
                                                 java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> environment)
        Expands any environment variable present in the input string.
        Parameters:
        input - the string to be expanded
        environment - the map containing the environment variables
        Returns:
        the input string with all environment variables replaced by their values

      • inDockerContainer

        public static boolean inDockerContainer()
